bookings.title: Consultant bookings
bookings.subtitle: Review incoming booking requests, track confirmed sessions, and monitor completed, rejected, or cancelled consultation outcomes.

note.pending: Student submitted the booking request and is waiting for your response.
note.confirmed: This booking has already been accepted and the session is confirmed.
note.completed: The consultation was delivered successfully and the booking is closed.
note.rejected: The request was rejected and the authorization hold should be reversed.
note.cancelled: The session was cancelled before final confirmation.

empty.title: No bookings in this view
empty.description: No bookings match the selected filter right now. Try another filter or return to the availability page.

details.title: Consultant request details
details.subtitle: Review the booking request, student context, payment-hold status, and consultant decision path.

notFound.title: Booking not found
notFound.description: The selected booking could not be found in the current mock store.

banner.accepted: Request accepted. The student and consultant views are now synced.
banner.rejected: Request rejected. The status update now appears across both views.
banner.completed: Session marked as completed. The workflow is now closed successfully.
banner.reset: Demo bookings were reset to their original mock states.

text.pending: This consultation request is waiting for your decision. The student has already completed the checkout and hold authorization step.
text.confirmed: You accepted this request. The session is now confirmed and ready for consultation delivery.
text.completed: This consultation was completed successfully and the booking is now closed from the consultant side.
text.rejected: You rejected this request, so the consultation did not proceed.
text.cancelled: This consultation request was cancelled before final completion and remains visible for history and audit purposes.
text.default: This request is waiting for consultant review.

note.pending: You can now review the request and either accept or reject it. The payment remains on hold until a decision is made.
note.confirmed: The consultation is scheduled. After delivery, this request can be marked as completed so payment capture is reflected.
note.completed: The consultation session was delivered successfully and the booking moved into a completed state.
note.rejected: The booking is now closed and the authorization hold should be reversed automatically.
note.cancelled: No session is active for this request and no further consultant action is needed.

pending.step1Description: The student selected a slot and completed the booking checkout flow.
pending.step2Description: The system created a payment hold before consultant review.
pending.step3Description: This request still needs to be accepted or rejected.
pending.step4Description: This step will complete after the consultant accepts the request.

confirmed.step1Description: The consultation request was created successfully.
confirmed.step2Description: The payment-hold step completed before consultant action.
confirmed.step3Description: The request was approved and the session was confirmed.
confirmed.step4Description: The booking is scheduled and ready for delivery.

completed.step1Description: The consultation request entered the workflow successfully.
completed.step2Description: The booking was confirmed and reserved.
completed.step4Description: The booking was closed after successful delivery.

rejected.step1Description: The student created the consultation request successfully.
rejected.step2Description: The payment hold was created before consultant review.
rejected.step3Description: The request was declined and the consultation will not proceed.
rejected.step4Description: The booking is closed and the hold should be released.

cancelled.step1Description: The consultation request was created successfully.
cancelled.step2Description: The booking was cancelled before final completion.
cancelled.step3Description: No active hold remains for this request.
cancelled.step4Description: The cancelled request remains visible in the consultant history.

decisionHelp.title: Decision help
decisionHelp.accept: Accept when the request fits your expertise and the slot is still appropriate for your schedule.
decisionHelp.reject: Reject when the request cannot be handled or the selected slot is no longer suitable.
decisionHelp.complete: After confirmation, mark the session as completed only when the consultation is actually delivered.

availability.title: Consultant availability
availability.subtitle: Manage your weekly consultation schedule, blocked dates, booking window, and slot configuration from the consultant side.

banner.saved: Availability saved. The consultant schedule preview is now updated.
banner.reset: Demo availability was reset to the original mock schedule.

weeklySchedule.title: Weekly schedule
weeklySchedule.description: Configure which days are bookable and define working hours, session duration, and buffer time.

bookingRules.title: Booking rules
bookingRules.description: Set timezone and how far ahead students can see available consultation slots.

blockedDates.title: Blocked dates
blockedDates.description: Add specific dates when you do not want to receive bookings, even if the day is normally available.

preview.title: Public preview
preview.description: These are example slot previews based on your currently enabled weekly schedule.

notes.title: Availability notes
notes.line1: Enabled days define the public slot pool visible to students on the consultant profile page.
notes.line2: Blocked dates override weekly availability and should be used for holidays, travel, and special exceptions.
notes.line3: The next integration step can connect this schedule directly to consultant detail availability cards.
